instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered and merged the missing “Move to Stanford” commit into `master`.

- Merge commit: `39aac36`
- Recovery branch retained: `recovery/move-to-stanford`
- Working tree is clean
- Build wasn’t run because Bundler isn’t installed (`bundle: not found`)

trajectory.summary: git status --short --branch && git branch --all --verbose --no-abbrev && git log --all --decorate --oneline -20 && git reflog --date=local -30

git show --stat --oneline --decorate 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 && git merge-base master 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39
git branch recovery/move-to-stanford 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 && git merge --no-edit recovery/move-to-stanford
git status --short && sed -n '1,80p' _includes/about.md && git show --format= --no-ext-diff d7d3e4b -- _includes/about.md _layouts/default.html
git add _includes/about.md && git commit --no-edit && git status --short --branch && git log --graph --decorate --oneline -6 && git diff HEAD^1..HEAD --stat && git diff --check HEAD^1..HEAD

rg --files -g 'Gemfile' -g 'package.json' -g '_config.yml' -g '*.gemspec' && git status --porcelain=v1 && git branch --contains 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 && git diff c4e38a1..master -- _includes/about.md _
